creator: hjh@best.com
text:
--- Makefile.0.05	Thu Jul 16 12:59:39 1998
+++ Makefile	Thu Jul 16 09:46:23 1998
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 # New ports collection makefile for:	lwm
-# Version required:	0.05
+# Version required:	0.06
 # Date created:		17 March 1998
 # Whom:			J Han <hjh@best.com>
 #
@@ -7,7 +7,7 @@
 #
 
 DISTNAME=	lwm
-PKGNAME=	lwm-0.05
+PKGNAME=	lwm-0.06
 CATEGORIES=	x11
 MASTER_SITES=	http://users.ch.genedata.com/~enh/
 EXTRACT_SUFX=	.tar.Z
;
